title: Jamshedpur、Jharkhand — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Jamshedpur、Jharkhand的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Jamshedpur是Jharkhand的一个城市，人口约1,350,000。India’s first planned industrial city, home to Tata Steel, known for its lush greenery, lakes, and high quality of life.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
